title: Quantitation of Ergot Alkaloids in Wheat Grain
author: Michelle Mostrom

steps.title: Prepare serial dilution
steps.instruction: Prepare serial dilution

steps.title: Transfer 50 µL of 500 Parts...
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 µL of 500 Parts per Billion (PPB) standard to poly vial for Standard 10

steps.title: Make up a 500 PPB solution...
steps.instruction: Make up a 500 PPB solution of 500 PPB each of Ergocornine, Ergocorninine, Ergocristine, Ergocristinine, Ergocryptine, Ergocryptinine, Ergosine, Ergosinine, Ergotamine, and Ergotaminine from reference standards.

steps.title: 500 ppb stock standards in individual...
steps.instruction: 500 ppb stock standards in individual aliquots for one serial dilution

steps.title: Make up from reference standards 500...
steps.instruction: Make up from reference standards 500 ppb solution of 500 ppb of each ergot alkaloids.

steps.title: Transfer 150 ul of 500ppb solution...
steps.instruction: Transfer 150 ul of 500ppb solution to amber vials and dry down under nitrogen.

steps.title: Store these vials in freezer (-20C)
steps.instruction: Store these vials in freezer (-20C)

steps.title: To use take out one vial...
steps.instruction: To use take out one vial and let warm to room temperature.

steps.title: Bring up vial in 150 ul...
steps.instruction: Bring up vial in 150 ul of 50 PPB Dihydroergocistine in extracting solution. Mix well.

steps.title: From your ISTD 100 PPB Dihyroergocristine...
steps.instruction: From your ISTD 100 PPB Dihyroergocristine in extracting solution make up 800 ul of 50 PPB Dihydroergocristine in extracting solution. (1:1 dilution)

steps.title: Use this to perform serial dilution of 10 standards
steps.instruction: Use this to perform serial dilution of 10 standards. Use the same 50 PPB Dihydroergocristine in extracting solution to dilute with during serial dilution.

steps.title: A B C 1 Standard PPB...
steps.instruction: A B C 1 Standard PPB 16x PPB 2 10 500 8000 3 9 250 4000 4 8 125 2000 5 7 62.5 1000 6 6 31.2 500 7 5 15.6 250 8 4 7.8 125 9 3 3.9 62 10 2 2.0 32 11 1 1.0 16 The standard curve has the following ten Calibrators

steps.title: Weigh out 5 grams of dried...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 5 grams of dried and ground sample into Centrifuge tube: Wheat ground on Perten Mill or Glen Mill particle size within 100-355 um. Wheat sample moisture is typical of wheat in long-term storage conditions or < 14 to 15% moisture. If upon physical evaluation it appears/feels wet samples are dried overnight in 60C oven.

steps.title: Shake for 30 minutes on Horizontal...
steps.instruction: Shake for 30 minutes on Horizontal Shaker at 150 +/- 10 Cycles per minute.

steps.title: Filter entire extract thru Whatman 54...
steps.instruction: Filter entire extract thru Whatman 54 filter paper into a new labeled centrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Transfer 4 mls of filtered extract...
steps.instruction: Transfer 4 mls of filtered extract to the glass tube provided with Mycosep kit.

steps.title: Push the 4 mls thru Mycosep 150 Ergot Column
steps.instruction: Push the 4 mls thru Mycosep 150 Ergot Column.

steps.title: Transfer 500ul of extract to a microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer 500ul of extract to a microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Dilute with 500 ul of 100...
steps.instruction: Dilute with 500 ul of 100 PPB Dihydroergocristine in extracting solution

steps.title: Final concentration of Dihydroergocristine is 50 PPB
steps.instruction: Final concentration of Dihydroergocristine is 50 PPB.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 RPM for 5 mins
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 RPM for 5 mins

steps.title: Transfer 100ul to Polypropylene vial for injection on QQQ
steps.instruction: Transfer 100ul to Polypropylene vial for injection on QQQ.

steps.title: Finale extract is a 16x dilution of sample
steps.instruction: Finale extract is a 16x dilution of sample.

steps.title: Prepare 10-point Standard curve by serial...
steps.instruction: Prepare 10-point Standard curve by serial dilution and run standard curve with samples daily.

steps.title: Add 40 mls of Extracting Solution
steps.instruction: Add 40 mls of Extracting Solution. Cap and invert to mix.

steps.title: Let extract sit for at least 1 hour
steps.instruction: Let extract sit for at least 1 hour.

steps.title: Analysis is carried out on an...
steps.instruction: Analysis is carried out on an Agilent 6460C Triple Quad LC/MS.It is carried out with positive electrospray ionization in Dynamic MRM mode using three major transitions per target compound.

steps.title: Samples are run with the LC...
steps.instruction: Samples are run with the LC by a method with the following parameters.

steps.title: UHPLC Column
steps.instruction: UHPLC Column : Agilent Zorbax Eclipse Plus C18 2.1 x 50 mm, 1.8 micron (P.N. 959757-902)

steps.title: Binary Pump
steps.instruction: Binary Pump: Flow: 0.200 mL/min High Pressure Limit: 550 bar Stop Time: 12.00 min Post Time: 1.0 min Gradient Program: %s %s Time A% B% 0.70 min 95% 5% 1.3 min 50% 50% 8.0 min 10% 90% 10.0 min 10% 90% 12.0 min 95% 5%

steps.title: Auto Injector Parameters %s %s AB...
steps.instruction: Auto Injector Parameters %s %s AB AB Injection Volume 2 µl Needle Wash 5 seconds with Acetonitrile Column Temp 30.00 °C

steps.title: Mobile Phase
steps.instruction: Mobile Phase: A: 3 mM ammonium carbonate in Water B: premixed Acetonitrile (90%) – Water (10%)

steps.title: Guard Column
steps.instruction: Guard Column: Zorbax Eclipse Plus C18, 2.1 x 5 mm, 1.8 micron, (P.N. 821725-901)

steps.title: LC-MS QQQ %s %s Agilent 6460C...
steps.instruction: LC-MS QQQ %s %s Agilent 6460C Triple Quadrupole Parameters Ionization mode Positive ESI with Agilent Jet Stream Scan type Dynamic MRM Gas temperature 200 °C Gas Flow 8 L/min Nebulizer pressure 45 psi Sheath gas temperature 400 °C Sheath gas flow 12 L/min Capillary voltage 3000 V Nozzle voltage 500 V Delta EMV 500 Cycle Time 500 ms

steps.instruction: Ergocristinine 9.1 610.2 305.1 139 30 5 1 Positive Qual

steps.instruction: Ergocristinine 9.1 610.2 223.1 139 38 5 1 Positive Quant

steps.title: Dihydroergocristine 6
steps.instruction: Dihydroergocristine 6.6 612.8 350.1 178 26 4 1 Positive Quant

steps.title: QQQ Time To minimize the matrix...
steps.instruction: QQQ Time To minimize the matrix going into the spray chamber, the HPLC flow should be diverted into waste from 10 minutes to the end of the analysis. %s %s # Start time Scan type Div Valve Delta EMV (+) Delta EMV (-) Stored 1 0 Dynamic MRM To MS 500 0 x 2 10 Dynamic MRM To Waste 0 0 x

steps.title: Anaylze data in mass hunter software
steps.instruction: Anaylze data in mass hunter software.Note ISTD is run as analyte and not used in quantitation.

steps.title: Analyze Batch
steps.instruction: Analyze Batch.

steps.title: The calibration curve is linear, ignore...
steps.instruction: The calibration curve is linear, ignore origin and weighed 1/x for all compounds.

steps.title: Navigate thru Batch table to see compounds, curves and results
steps.instruction: Navigate thru Batch table to see compounds, curves and results.

steps.title: Check integration of peaks and verify...
steps.instruction: Check integration of peaks and verify if compounds are correctly identified.

steps.title: Check integration and response of the...
steps.instruction: Check integration and response of the ISTD in each sample and standards.Verify that each sample has been injected.

steps.title: Total Ergots is set up as...
steps.instruction: Total Ergots is set up as a MRM compound in Mass Hunter Quant software Edit and is set up to add up all of the Ergots.It is shown in the quant results table and reported out as Total Ergot.

steps.title: Final extract is
steps.instruction: Final extract is .0625 equivalence so the value from the curve needs to be multiplied by 16.

steps.title: The standard curve is set to detect the following range
steps.instruction: The standard curve is set to detect the following range: 16 ppb to 8000ppb.The detection limit is the lowest standard run.

steps.title: LLOQ (Lower limit of Quantification)
steps.instruction: LLOQ (Lower limit of Quantification): 20 ppb

steps.title: ULOQ (Upper limit of Quantification)
steps.instruction: ULOQ (Upper limit of Quantification): 8000 ppb
